# Evidence at a glance {#sec-evidence .unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — the table will be generated from the model CSVs.
:::

*[Scaffold]* A single table with **one row per outcome**, intended as the spine a reader can take in without the chapter sequence (and a seed for the plain-language publication). Columns:

| Outcome | ITT effect $\tau$ (items, 95% CrI) | $P(\tau>0)$ | $P(\text{benefit} \ge \delta)$ | Within-person (DiD) | Evidence label |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Word reading | *[from CSV]* | | | | |
| Letter–sound knowledge | | | | | |
| … | | | | | |

*To be auto-generated* by a shared code chunk reading `tau_summary.csv`, `rope_summary.csv` and `did_summary.csv` across the ITT suite, so the table and the per-chapter numbers cannot drift. Evidence labels qualify the *evidence*, never the effect size (@sec-bridge).
